About

Where regulation
meets reality.

"The work I find most interesting sits at the intersection of judgment and systems, where you're not just making the right call, but building infrastructure that makes consistent decisions possible at scale."

Trust and safety professional at the intersection of AI tooling and emerging tech regulation. Six years across TikTok, Lockwood Publishing, and Klaviyo: CSAM/CSEA response, large-platform content governance, and practical implementation of GDPR, DSA, the Online Safety Act, and the EU AI Act.

Built and shipped CompliGate at Klaviyo, alongside three other production AI systems embedded in live compliance workflows. Currently building Roam, an iOS travel product on Claude and Supabase, as a sole founder.

Experience

Six years
on the frontline.

Dec 2023 to Present
Klaviyo
Global Compliance & Risk Management
Compliance Specialist

Designed and shipped CompliGate, classifying and routing compliance enquiries across global teams. Shipped four production AI tools with human review checkpoints and audit traceability. Rebuilt the Global Compliance Knowledge Base (120+ pages). Redesigned 17 escalation models. Processed 3,682 tickets in 2025 at 146% capacity while maintaining quality benchmarks.

AI Tooling GDPR EU AI Act DSA CCPA
Apr 2022 to Dec 2023
Lockwood Publishing
Social Mobile Platform · Millions of Users
Trust & Safety Lead

Owned end-to-end CSAM detection and response: hash-matching against NCMEC/IWF, formal law enforcement referrals. Platform-side responder to FBI and UK NCA CEOP requests. Calibrated chat-filter detection rules against grooming language patterns, iterating on false-positive/negative rates. Contributed safety-by-design input on product features affecting younger users.

CSAM Response Grooming Detection Law Enforcement Online Safety Act
Sep 2019 to Apr 2022
TikTok
Hyper-Growth Phase · Global Regulatory Scrutiny
Content Management Specialist

Reviewed high-severity violations across global markets including CSAM/CSEA requiring mandatory reporting. Surfaced systemic detection gaps in child-safety classifiers, feeding signals to policy teams, contributing to detection-rule changes reducing false negatives. Worked alongside FBI, NCA CEOP, and APAC authorities on coordinated grooming network takedowns. Translated UK/EU/US regulatory requirements into operational moderation standards as DSA and OSA took shape.

Content Moderation Policy Development CSAM Multi-Market
Projects

Built, shipped,
running.

01
CompliGate

Internal AI tool at Klaviyo that classifies and routes compliance enquiries across global teams. Built with human review checkpoints and full audit traceability. In production across live compliance workflows.

AI Classification LLM Audit Trail
02
Trust Checker

Chrome extension aggregating domain trust signals from 11+ sources into a single compliance score. Used daily by Klaviyo's compliance team for KYC, vendor due diligence, and customer investigations.

Chrome Extension Risk Signals KYC
03
Roam

AI-powered iOS travel app on Claude and Supabase. Available on the App Store. Designed and shipped end-to-end as sole founder: SwiftUI, Supabase backend, two-step LLM architecture, StoreKit 2 subscriptions.

iOS / SwiftUI Claude API Supabase
